global_visual_rules.style_direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first; Editorial-infographic style with hand-drawn organic lines, warm palette, conceptual composition. Not a screenshot, not a diagram — an editorial visual.
must_have: ample whitespace and one dominant focal structure
flat color blocks with clear line hierarchy
layout-first visual storytelling instead of decorative art
section visuals must map to explicit layout grammar (hub-spoke / linear-progression / comparison-matrix / bento-grid)
must_avoid: busy ornamental textures that reduce readability
style drift between cover and inline images
paragraph-like dense text rendered inside image blocks

cover_image.purpose: Compress the article's main idea into one visual system that is understandable in one glance.
cover_image.concept_summary: 你的系统跑在经过认证的硬件上，每一个接口变更都要走合规流程，供应商名单三年才能更新一次。这不是保守主义，是行业现实。而 AI 厂商的发布节奏以周计算，这两个时钟根本不在同一个频率上。
scene_elements: one focal visual occupying roughly 60-70% area
icon-based metaphor instead of literal screenshots
clean title zone with breathing room
start/end anchors that are visually obvious
key_relationships: present one question and one promise
make the article worth clicking in one glance
make the core judgment visible within one glance
show one tension and one payoff only

on_canvas_text.headline: Cohere 与 Saab
on_canvas_text.subheadline: 你的系统跑在经过认证的硬件上

composition.diagram_focus: sequential operating logic with explicit stage handoff

visual_constraints: prefer conceptual composition over decorative scene rendering
preserve warm off-white background and restrained accent colors
negative_constraints: do not mimic generic social banner aesthetics
avoid full-image text walls or dense annotation
cover_image.prompt_seed: Make this a hook-first cover. One question or tension, one promise, not a dense summary. Style profile: baoyu-cover-image: editorial-infographic (conceptual + warm + hand-drawn). Cover should feel like an editorial infographic hero image with calm hand-drawn confidence. Editorial-infographic: cream base, coral accent, teal structure. Hand-drawn with controlled imperfection. Apply baoyu-cover-image preset editorial-infographic with conceptual composition. Apply hand-drawn organic line quality with controlled imperfection and clean hierarchy. Style profil…

inline_images.purpose: Reset attention at the first major section transition and summarize the new concept block.
inline_images.placement_rule: Insert near the start of framing to reset attention at this section transition.
scene_elements: numbered step modules with directional arrows
one icon per stage for quick recognition

on_canvas_text.headline: 你的系统跑在经过认证的…

visual_constraints: maintain same house style as cover
support section transition and comprehension reset
negative_constraints: no decorative image blocks without structural meaning
inline_images.prompt_seed: Use the workflow_map grammar. This is one visual job, not a paragraph summary: 你的系统跑在经过认证的硬件上，每一个接口变更都要走合规… Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: knowledge-base (infographic + vector-illustration). Inline image should behave like a section explainer card with fast scan value. Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: process-flow (flowchart + notion). Apply process-flow preset: flowchart logic with Notion-style clean spacing.

inline_images.purpose: Reset attention at the first major section transition and summarize the new concept block.
inline_images.concept_summary: Saab 不是一家普通的企业客户。其运营系统横跨飞行控制、任务规划、态势感知和后勤支援，每个环节都有严格的合规要求和认证边界。对这类客户而言，AI 整合的障碍从来不是"技术上能不能做到"，而是：
inline_images.placement_rule: Insert near the start of section_02 to reset attention at this section transition.
scene_elements: two-column contrast with one takeaway strip
key_relationships: make the before/after or old/new contrast obvious
show why one example proves the point
visual_constraints: maintain same house style as cover
support section transition and comprehension reset
negative_constraints: no decorative image blocks without structural meaning
inline_images.prompt_seed: Use the example_comparison grammar. This is one visual job, not a paragraph summary: 这份 MOU 解决的核心摩擦是什么 Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: knowledge-base (infographic + vector-illustration). Inline image should behave like a section explainer card with fast scan value. Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: versus (comparison + vector-illustration). Use comparison-matrix thinking: align differences by one common axis.

inline_images.purpose: Reset attention at the first major section transition and summarize the new concept block.
inline_images.concept_summary: **现在值得认真跟进的场景**，是那些同时满足以下两个条件的团队：其一，正在评估将 AI 引入任务规划、异常检测或运营调度等受约束工作流；其二，已经在和 Cohere 或类似私有部署模型的厂商做技术预研。Saab 与 Cohere 的合作框架，意味着这类谈判在国防和航空航天行业…
